title: elaeagnus glabra var. oxyphylla
intro: Elaeagnus glabra var. oxyphylla, also known as silverberry or wolfberry, is a type of shrub or small tree native to China and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Elaeagnus glabra var. oxyphylla is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and its berries are also consumed as a food supplement.
